overall.description: First-person perspective from inside a truck cabin driving through heavy snowfall on a highway at night. Windshield wipers operate continuously to clear accumulating snow. The truck navigates past overhead road signs and takes an exit ramp, with headlights illuminating the snow-covered road ahead. Game engine footage consistent with Euro Truck Simulator 2.

agents.ego_description: driving steadily on snow-covered highway with active windshield wipers, maintaining lane position in heavy snowfall

notable_agents.action: oncoming truck with headlights visible traveling in opposite lane

entered.detail: multi-lane highway completely covered in snow with faint lane markings visible
metal highway guardrail partially buried in snow along the right shoulder
truck dashboard with illuminated GPS navigation screen and instrument cluster

segments.scene_description: The truck travels along a wide, snow-covered highway at night. Heavy snow accumulates on the windshield as wipers sweep back and forth. Headlights illuminate the road ahead, revealing snow-covered guardrails on the right and the occasional oncoming vehicle in the opposite lane. The dashboard GPS glows with navigation information.

events.description: passing under large overhead gantry with blue highway directional signs

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing under overhead gantry signs while maintaining steady speed on the highway

entered.detail: large blue highway directional signs mounted on metal overhead gantry structure
line of trees along highway edge covered in heavy snow

segments.scene_description: The truck approaches a large overhead gantry with blue highway signs visible against the dark sky. After passing under the gantry, the road continues through a section with snow-covered trees visible on the right side. The snowfall remains heavy, and visibility stays low as the truck maintains its course.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved highway exit ramp with high snow banks

events.description: truck takes right curve onto exit ramp, reducing speed for the tighter turn
transition from main highway to narrower secondary road or continuation of exit ramp with changing roadside features

agents.ego_description: navigating curved exit ramp with reduced speed, steering through the right-hand turn in heavy snow conditions

entered.detail: curved exit ramp branching off from main highway with snow-covered surface
tall bank of plowed snow piled high along the right edge of the ramp
metal guardrail on left side of exit ramp separating from main highway

segments.scene_description: The truck takes a right curve onto an exit ramp, leaving the main highway behind. The road narrows with high snow banks on the right side and guardrails on the left. Snow continues to fall heavily as the truck navigates the curved ramp, with snow-covered vegetation becoming more prominent along the roadside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a truck cabin as it moves from a wide, open highway into a narrow, curving exit ramp during a heavy nocturnal snowstorm. It begins with the truck traveling along a broad road, where headlights cut through the dark to reveal snow-covered guardrails and oncoming traffic while wipers struggle against the accumulating snow. As the vehicle maintains its course, the scene shifts to pass under a large overhead gantry with glowing blue signs before gliding past a line of snow-laden trees. The perspective then transitions as the truck steers into a right-hand curve, leaving the main highway for a narrowing exit ramp. Finally, the environment closes in with high snow banks and dense roadside vegetation pressing against the edges of the road under the relentless snowfall.
